global_preflight.notes: No blocker closure claim is valid without command evidence and linked artifacts.

blockers.name: analyzer header entry + real analyzer UI surface family
closure_criteria: UI surface route and header entry are present and exercised
Automated checks pass and evidence artifacts are attached

blockers.name: real user-facing charts and animated charts
closure_criteria: Chart data rendering is proven with deterministic tests
Animation behavior evidence exists in captured artifacts

blockers.name: full required external YouTube metrics breadth
closure_criteria: All required YouTube metrics are represented in contracts
Integration evidence validates metric breadth end-to-end

blockers.name: real historical backfill feature flow
closure_criteria: Backfill flow is executable and persisted outputs are verifiable
Automated tests cover trigger, processing, and readback

blockers.name: real planning assistant feature surface
closure_criteria: Planning surface contracts are exercised by automated tests
Review evidence shows production-shaped response behavior

blockers.name: real Telegram analyzer operator surface
closure_criteria: Operator-facing behavior is verified with deterministic evidence

blockers.name: truthful export coverage for planning outputs and comparison outputs
closure_criteria: Export outputs contain planning/comparison fields without omission

blockers.name: full automated evidence for the completed feature set
closure_criteria: Comprehensive automated matrix is present and reproducible
All blocker evidence references are linked and auditable
